data.title: PepGen Inc. Announces Positive Phase 1 Study Results
data.description:
PepGen Inc. ( (PEPG) ) has issued an announcement.

On September 24, 2025, PepGen Inc. announced positive results from its FREEDOM-DM1 Phase 1 study, demonstrating a 53.7% mean splicing correction in patients with myotonic dystrophy type 1 (DM1) following a single 15 mg/kg dose of PGN-EDODM1. This marks the highest splicing correction reported in DM1 patients, with all participants showing improvement. The treatment was generally well-tolerated, with mild to moderate adverse events. These findings reinforce previous data from lower dose cohorts and suggest potential for reversing molecular defects associated with DM1, which could lead to functional improvements in symptoms like myotonia and muscle weakness. PepGen plans to report further data from its ongoing FREEDOM2-DM1 study in early 2026.

The most recent analyst rating on (PEPG) stock is a Sell with a $1.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on PepGen Inc. stock, see the PEPG Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on PEPG Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, PEPG is a Underperform.

While technical indicators are mixed, the valuation remains unattractive due to negative earnings. Recent corporate events, including promising trial results and board expansions, offer some positive momentum but are insufficient to offset the financial concerns.

To see Spark’s full report on PEPG stock, click here.

More about PepGen Inc.

PepGen Inc. is a clinical-stage biotechnology company focused on developing next-generation oligonucleotide therapies aimed at transforming the treatment of severe neuromuscular and neurological diseases. The company utilizes its Enhanced Delivery Oligonucleotide (EDO) platform, which leverages cell-penetrating peptides to enhance the uptake and activity of conjugated oligonucleotide therapeutics.

data.title: Fluent Approves New Equity Participation Plan
data.description:
The latest announcement is out from Fluent ( (FLNT) ).

On September 22, 2025, Fluent, Inc. announced the approval of its Equity Participation Plan aimed at incentivizing employees and service providers to contribute to the company’s long-term success through ownership interests linked to the company’s stock value. The plan involves granting restricted stock units (RSUs) to eligible participants, which include employees, directors, and independent contractors, and will be settled in cash based on the fair market value of the company’s stock. The plan is designed to align the interests of participants with the company’s performance, although RSU holders will not participate in dividends. The board of directors will administer the plan, with the authority to designate participants, determine awards, and make necessary adjustments, while retaining the right to amend or terminate the plan.
